text:
Task completed: 1. In patient account, after clicking AI button, there is overlap between the word Done and the word Check
2. Also in patient account, the button save address needs to be clicked twice to be able to save the address
2. All expandable buttons across the app have the blinking issue
PR was merged but didn't auto sync with HF. Refer to attached image too
Again sync failed. Refer attached image

The error is clear: **HF rejected the push because `__pycache__/main.cpython-311.pyc` (a binary file) was committed to the repo.**

Let me fix this by removing it from git tracking and updating `.gitignore`.There's no root `.gitignore`. I'll create one and remove the tracked `__pycache__` file.Good — no more pyc files tracked. Now let me commit and push to trigger the sync.Now I need to merge this to `main` so the HF sync workflow triggers.The `__pycache__/main.cpython-311.pyc` is **also tracked
Task completed: Still didn't sync with HF
Task completed: Still not syncing to HF
Recreate the yml file for syncing gh to hf. Ensure the details are correct. Currently the HF is not auto syncing upon pushing code to GH
Task completed: Recreate the yml file for syncing gh to hf. Ensure the details are correct. Currently the HF is not auto syncing upon pushing code to GH
